Operation 'sendEmail' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks critical details about inputs (recipient, subject, body, attachments), outputs (message ID, delivery status), and side effects (email queuing). Enhanced version provides AI agents with clear understanding of what data is needed, what will be returned, and what happens after the operation completes.

data.current_description: Send a single transactional or bulk email
data.summary_suggestion: Send a single transactional or bulk email
data.description_suggestion: Sends a single transactional or bulk email through Mailtrap. Accepts email content including recipient address, subject, body, and optional attachments. Returns a confirmation response with the message ID and delivery status. The email is queued for immediate sending and will be processed according to your account settings.

message: Operation 'batchSendEmail' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary lacks specificity about the batch limit and purpose. Description is incomplete - missing details about input format (array of email objects), output structure (batch ID, message IDs), and processing behavior (asynchronous sending). Enhanced version clarifies the batch structure, return values, and that emails are processed asynchronously, enabling AI agents to properly handle batch operations and track results.

data.current_description: Send up to 500 emails in a single batch request
data.summary_suggestion: Send up to 500 emails in a single batch
data.description_suggestion: Sends up to 500 emails in a single batch request through Mailtrap, optimizing throughput for bulk email operations. Accepts an array of email objects, each containing recipient address, subject, body, and optional attachments. Returns a batch confirmation response with a batch ID and individual message IDs for tracking. All emails in the batch are queued for processing and may be sent asynchronously.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about the batch limit and purpose. Description is incomplete - missing details about input format (array of email objects), output structure (batch ID, message IDs), and processing behavior (asynchronous sending). Enhanced version clarifies the batch structure, return values, and that emails are processed asynchronously, enabling AI agents to properly handle batch operations and track results.
